title: FreeFred Canon
summary:
**Repo:** FreeFred (`EVEglyphDesign/freefred`)
**Parent canon:** [CanFree](https://github.com/EVEglyphDesign/canfree) — all CanFree canon inherits by reference.

title: FreeFred — Civilian Voice
summary:
**Canon ID:** CANON-FREEFRED-CIVILIAN-VOICE-001
**Status:** locked
**Governs:** the exact voice, tone, and structure of every civilian-facing surface.

title: Founder Exclusion Doctrine
summary:
Canon ID: **CANON-FREEFRED-FOUNDER-EXCLUSION-001**
Status: locked
Applies to: FreeFred, HelpTheHelpers, CanFree, and every downstream tool.

title: FreeFred — Fredericton Police Force Officer COI Working View
summary:
**Canon ID:** CANON-FREEFRED-FPF-OFFICER-COI-001
**Status:** locked
**Governs:** how FreeFred profiles individual Fredericton Police Force employees for conflict-of-interest visibility, and to whom that visibility is delivered.
**Related:** `fredericton-police-posture.md` (amended by this canon),
`professional-registry-doctrine.md`, `role-classification.md`,
`pattern-access-doctrine.md`, `non-activist-stance.md`,
CanFree `canon/canfree-as-base.md`.

title: FreeFred — Fredericton Police Force Posture
summary:
**Canon ID:** CANON-FREEFRED-FPF-001
**Status:** locked
**Governs:** how FreeFred engages the Fredericton Police Force.

title: FreeFred — Hard Filters
summary:
**Canon ID:** CANON-FREEFRED-FILTERS-001
**Status:** locked
**Governs:** machine-enforced exclusions from the corpus. Non-negotiable, non-overrideable.

title: FreeFred — Public Education History for NB-Government Professionals
summary:
**Canon ID:** CANON-FREEFRED-NB-GOV-EDU-001
**Status:** locked
**Governs:** the public education-history block attached to every
NB-government-employed professional whose name surfaces in the FreeFred
diversion / docket corpus.
**Related:** `fpf-officer-coi.md` (COI + SAP HR + education),
`professional-registry-doctrine.md`, `role-classification.md`,
`pattern-access-doctrine.md`, `hard-filters.md`.

title: CANON-FREEFRED-NB-SUBSET-OF-CANFREE-001
summary: **FreeFred is a subset of CanFree.** Everything that happens in New Brunswick is a subset of the rules for the country. FreeFred does not restate national rights or federal law. FreeFred inherits from CanFree (see `canon/canfree-as-base.md` in the CanFree repo) and adds only what is specific to New Brunswick.

title: Outreach-Identification Doctrine
summary:
Canon ID: **CANON-FREEFRED-OUTREACH-ID-001**
Status: locked
Related: `records-recall-doctrine.md`, `one-input-total-pull.md`,
`hard-filters.md`, `civilian-voice.md`,
CanFree `canon/priority-of-care.md`

title: FreeFred — Pattern Access Doctrine
summary:
**Canon ID:** CANON-FREEFRED-PATTERN-ACCESS-001
**Status:** locked
**Governs:** what goes into the corpus, why, and what the civilian is entitled to see.

title: Professional Registry Doctrine
summary:
Canon ID: **CANON-FREEFRED-PROFREG-001**
Status: locked
Repo: **HelpTheHelpers** (new sister repo, to be created)
Related: `outreach-identification.md`, `records-recall-doctrine.md`,
`one-input-total-pull.md`, CanFree `canon/care-philosophy.md`

title: Records-Recall Doctrine
summary:
Canon ID: **CANON-FREEFRED-RECORDS-RECALL-001**
Status: locked
Supersedes: partial overlap with `pattern-access-doctrine.md` — that doctrine
is about the *civilian's right to see*; this one is about the *civilian's
right to gather back*.

title: CANON-FREEFRED-ROLE-CLASSIFICATION-001
summary: Every named person surfaced in the New Brunswick diversion, criminal, family, or social-services pipeline is classified into exactly one of two roles. There is no third class. The classification determines what the platform does with, for, or on behalf of that person.

title: FreeFred — Scope Locked
summary:
**Canon ID:** CANON-FREEFRED-SCOPE-001
**Status:** locked
**Governs:** what FreeFred builds first, and what it does not do until the tech is proven.
